name: /copywriter-framework
long_description: Complete 8-phase sales copy framework for creating high-converting sales letters, landing pages, and marketing materials using proven psychological triggers and persuasion patterns.

name: /copywriter-pas
long_description: Generate sales copy using the Problem-Agitation-Solution framework. Identifies the prospect's pain point, amplifies the emotional impact of that problem, then presents your offer as the solution.

name: /copywriter-aida
long_description: Create marketing copy using the Attention-Interest-Desire-Action framework. Grabs attention, builds interest, creates desire for the solution, and drives the reader to take action.

name: /copywriter-sales-letter
long_description: Generate complete long-form sales letters with full structure including headline, lead, story, problem agitation, solution presentation, proof, offer, guarantee, urgency, and close.

name: /copywriter-vsl
long_description: Create complete Video Sales Letter scripts optimized for conversion. Includes hook, story, problem presentation, solution reveal, proof elements, offer stack, and call-to-action.

name: /copywriter-webinar
long_description: Generate high-converting webinar scripts including introduction, content delivery, teaching segments, transition to pitch, offer presentation, Q&A handling, and closing sequences.
